title: Spire declares dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Spire Inc. (NYSE:SR) announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.825 per share, payable July 2, 2026. The company has continuously paid dividends since 1946 and is marking its 23rd consecutive year of increasing its common stock dividend on an annualized basis.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a dividend increase for the 23rd consecutive year, demonstrating consistent financial performance, shareholder commitment, and operational stability. Dividend increases are typically viewed positively by investors as they signal confidence in future cash flows and company health.

title: Spire Edges Lower After Strategic Shift With Asset Sale
author: Akanksha Bakshi
description: Spire Inc. (NYSE: SR) agreed to sell its natural gas storage assets to I Squared Capital for $650 million ($600 million at closing plus $50 million deferred). The divestiture aims to sharpen focus on regulated utility operations and fund the acquisition of Piedmont Natural Gas Tennessee business. The transaction is expected to close in H2 2026. Spire shares declined 0.17% to $92.45 on the news.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: While the stock declined slightly (0.17%), the strategic asset sale is presented as a positive long-term move to focus on core regulated utility operations and fund growth acquisitions. The company reaffirmed FY2027 EPS guidance ($5.40-$5.60) with 5-7% long-term growth, and analysts maintain a Buy rating with $82.23 average price target. The modest decline appears to be a short-term market reaction rather than negative sentiment about the transaction itself.

title: Spire Inc. Amends Redemption of 5.90% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
author: Prnewswire
description: Spire Inc. announced the redemption of all 10,000 outstanding shares of its 5.90% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock on February 13, 2026. Shareholders will receive a redemption price of $25.00 per depositary share plus accrued dividends, with a regular quarterly dividend of $0.36875 per depositary share payable on February 17, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The redemption announcement is a routine corporate action with no indication of financial distress or strategic concerns. The company is executing a planned redemption with clear terms and timelines, which is a standard capital management activity. No negative or positive operational developments are mentioned.

title: Spire declares dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Spire Inc. (NYSE:SR) announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.825 per share, payable April 2, 2026. The company has continuously paid dividends since 1946 and 2026 marks its 23rd consecutive year of increasing its common stock dividend on an annualized basis. Spire also announced its intent to redeem all outstanding shares of its 5.90% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock on February 13, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a dividend and announced its 23rd consecutive year of dividend increases, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to shareholder returns. Continuous dividend payments since 1946 and consistent annual increases indicate strong financial health and shareholder-friendly capital allocation.

title: Spire declares dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Spire Inc. announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.785 per share, payable on October 2, 2025, to shareholders of record on September 11, 2025. This marks the company's 22nd consecutive year of increasing its common stock dividend.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company has consistently increased its dividend for 22 consecutive years, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to shareholders. The press release highlights the company's growth strategy and service to 1.7 million homes and businesses.
